summary: Add Shape (c) to extractStreamValues for Strava's key_by_type=true response format.
reason: When activities/drift and training/zones call GET /streams?key_by_type=true, Strava returns {"heartrate":{"type":"heartrate","data":[...]}} — a nested map, not a flat array. The original two-branch implementation silently returned nil for this shape, making drift always emit empty output.
validated_outcome: extractStreamValues now handles all three Strava stream shapes: single-stream {data:[...]}, flat keyed {heartrate:[...]}, and keyed-object {heartrate:{type:...,data:[...]}}.
